top_findings.title: Import block is un-sorted in app.py
top_findings.evidence: app.py:7 — from __future__ import annotations should be separated from other imports
top_findings.suggestion: Organize imports with proper blank line between __future__ imports and regular imports

top_findings.title: Import block is un-sorted in test_app.py
top_findings.evidence: test_app.py:7 — pytest import should be ordered before relative imports
top_findings.suggestion: Sort imports: standard library, third-party, local imports
